name: Shandong Tongda Island New Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shandong Tongda Island New Materials Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells microfiber leather products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers sport shoe, labor shoe, and furnishings material, as well as auto, speed tail, airplane seat, and inner decoration. It also provides bags and case, belt, shoe lining, and microfiber for gloves. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Changyi, the People's Republic of China.
